title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: libsecret bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for libsecret is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.1 Release Notes linked from the References section.

fixes.description: Package libsecret-mock-service and push it in CRB

full_text:
An update for libsecret is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.1 Release Notes linked from the References section.
